notes: Live Shopify evidence that validationCreate falls back to a Function-derived title when title is omitted or explicitly null, while preserving an explicit empty string. This shop persisted the private raw extension name `t:name`, but the exact Admin `shopifyFunctions` hydrate response only exposes the localized public Function title `conformance-validation`; the proxy cannot derive the private name without unsupported runtime Shopify mutation passthrough or forged metadata. The capture cleans disposable validations before and after the scenario, then verifies validation(id:) and validations(first: 3) read-after-write title behavior plus the resolved Function reference through validation.shopifyFunction.id/handle. Admin API 2026-04 does not expose Validation.functionId/functionHandle scalar fields; runtime tests cover the proxy-local scalar projections from the same staged resolved Function id. ExpectedDifferences are limited to synthetic ids and the private title fallback gap; no allowlist applies to shopifyFunction.id/handle or explicit empty-string title.
